message:
fix: code quality issues in send.go and auth/restart.go

1. send.go: Fixed malformed lines where statements were merged onto
   single lines with excessive whitespace (lines 641-642, 735-736).
   This was likely a merge conflict or copy-paste error.

2. auth/restart.go: Changed fmt.Printf to log.Printf in library code.
   Per AGENTS.md guidelines, library code should not use fmt.Println
   for output - use the standard log package instead.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
